transcriptText:
Agent: Hello, you've reached Phonely Dental — how can I help you today?
User: Hi, I'd like to schedule a cleaning. ...

transcript.content: Hello, you've reached Phonely Dental — how can I help you today?
Hi, I'd like to schedule a cleaning.
Of course — could I get your name and a good email to send the confirmation to?
Maria Hernandez, maria dot h at example dot com.
Great. I have an opening Friday May twenty-ninth at ten thirty A M. Does that work?

summary: Maria Hernandez booked a dental cleaning appointment for May 29 at 10:30 AM and provided her email for confirmation.
longSummary: Maria Hernandez called Phonely Dental to schedule a routine cleaning. The agent collected her name and email address (maria.h@example.com), offered an available appointment slot on Friday May 29 at 10:30 AM, and confirmed the booking. The caller agreed and the call ended cordially.
keyPoints: Caller is an existing patient asking for a routine cleaning
Confirmation email to be sent to maria.h@example.com
actionItems: Send appointment confirmation email to maria.h@example.com
Create calendar event for 2026-05-29 10:30 AM cleaning with Maria Hernandez
